description_long: This bungalow features a compact, single-story structure with a prominent hip roof covered in gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, complemented by a stone or concrete base and a small front porch with steps leading to a central door. Multiple windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front porch is covered by an extension of the main roof, supported by columns, providing a sheltered entryway. The surrounding area is a flat, grassy lawn, and there are billboard-like signs visible on one side of the property. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a hip roof, light-colored walls, a small covered front porch, and symmetrically arranged windows, set on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, central door, and two large windows, with billboard signs visible to the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back wall with minimal window openings and the extension of the hip roof, with billboards seen on the left side.
description_view_2: Opposite front view showing the main entrance, porch, and steps, with the billboards now on the right side.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the porch area, multiple windows, and the billboards positioned along the right edge of the property.
